steps.title: Find vertex x from midpoint of zeros
Evaluate f(3) to get minimum
steps.content: $f(3)=(2(3)-20)(2(3)+8)=(-14)(14)=-196$. The computed minimum is −196, matching the source choice value.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $-196$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $-196$.
